summary: UI updates testing complete. All new visual features verified: hero section with 3D sphere image and counter animations, client logos marquee carousel, vertical services cards with 40px gap, Track Record card in Why Choose Us with 2x2 counter grid, infinite testimonials carousel, CTA banner with indigo gradient distinct from footer, and mobile responsiveness. All 47 frontend tests passed (33 existing + 14 new). All 17 backend API tests passed.

issues: Newsletter popup appears after 5 seconds - tests dismiss it via localStorage

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI updates fully verified. New specs added: ui-updates.spec.ts (8 tests for new visual features) and mobile-responsiveness.spec.ts (6 tests for mobile layout). Existing specs unchanged and still pass. Counter animation (useCountUp hook) works correctly via IntersectionObserver. Marquee animation for client logos (CSS animation-marquee) verified. Testimonials infinite scroll (animate-scroll-testimonials) verified. CTA banner distinct from footer with indigo gradient background verified. Backend has no changes - all API endpoints working.
